subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabli-Taqi! Blessed art thou for having turned thy face toward My countenance, and for the mention of thy name in My presence at the time when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد قبل تقی طوبی لک بما اقبلت الی وجهی و ذکر اسمک فی محضری حین الذی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
